scripts.lint: npm run ai:check && npm run lint -w @rubiks-cube-solver/web
scripts.pretest:e2e: npm run wasm:build && npm run build
scripts.product:gate: npm run ai:check && cargo fmt --check && cargo test && cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings && cargo run --quiet -p cube-engine --bin generate_pruning_tables -- --output crates/cube-engine/pruning-tables --max-depth 8 && npm run pruning:web:generate && npm run wasm:build && npm run build && npm run lint -w @rubiks-cube-solver/web && npm run test:e2e && python -m pytest ml && python -m ml.train_value_baseline --dataset datasets/fixtures/small.jsonl --epochs 1 --seed 0 --output ml/outputs/value-baseline --inference-repeats 1 && cargo run --quiet -p cube-engine --bin solver_quality_report && cargo run --quiet -p cube-engine --bin solver_quality_report -- --hybrid-value-outputs ml/outputs/value-baseline/value_outputs.tsv
scripts.roadmap:run:long: ROADRUNNER_PROVIDER_TIMEOUT_MS=3600000 ROADRUNNER_AUTO_RESTART_IDLE_MS=0 ROADRUNNER_VERIFY_TIMEOUT_MS=1200000 roadrunner run --roadmap roadmap.md --max-steps 999 --max-hours 72
